title: windows does not release ram after operations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testA (pde_event_id TEXT, bene_sex_ident_cd INTEGER NOT NULL, bene_age_cat_cd INTEGER DEFAULT 0, pde_drug_cd INTEGER CHECK (pde_drug_cd > 0), pde_drug_str_cd INTEGER, pde_drug_str_units_cd INTEGER, pde_drug_dose_cd INTEGER, pde_drug_class_cd INTEGER, pde_drug_qty_dis INTEGER, pde_drug_day_sply_cd INTEGER, pde_drug_cost INTEGER, pde_drug_pat_pay_cd INTEGER, pde_drug_type_cd INTEGER);
INSERT INTO testA (pde_event_id, bene_sex_ident_cd, bene_age_cat_cd, pde_drug_cd) VALUES ('event1', 1, NULL, 10);
UPDATE testA SET bene_age_cat_cd = 2 WHERE pde_event_id = 'event1';
SELECT pde_event_id, bene_sex_ident_cd, bene_age_cat_cd FROM testA WHERE bene_age_cat_cd IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: windows does not release RAM after database operations
